ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name <> 'WD - Supervisory', $Profile.Name <> 'WD - Ops Manager -Rig', $Profile.Name <> 'WD - Finance', $Profile.Name <> 'WD - Ops Manager -Rig (New)', $Profile.Name <> 'WD - Ops Supervisor', $Profile.Name <> 'WD - Supervisory 2.0', $Profile.Name <> 'WD - BOO' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not authorized to add/edit Contract Job Item. Kindly, contact your Operations Manager for same.
